completion_promises.criterion_text: tests/test_supervisor_with_subagents.py — builds the supervisor via build_supervisor(test_config, tools=<FEAT-J002 set>, async_subagents=build_async_subagents(test_config), ambient_tool_factory=lambda: assemble_tool_list(test_config, include_frontier=False)) and asserts the return is a CompiledStateGraph.
completion_promises.evidence: TestAC001SupervisorBuild::test_build_supervisor_with_subagents_returns_compiled_state_graph composes the FEAT-J002 attended tool list (assemble_tool_list with include_frontier=True), wires async_subagents=build_async_subagents(stub_registry_config) and supplies an ambient_tool_factory closure that calls assemble_tool_list(stub_registry_config, capability_registry, include_frontier=False). It then asserts isinstance(graph, CompiledStateGraph). Test passes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The supervisor's tool catalogue includes all FEAT-J002 tools (no regression).
completion_promises.evidence: TestAC002FeatJ002ToolsPresent::test_compiled_graph_exposes_all_feat_j002_tool_names walks the compiled graph via _extract_tool_names() and asserts FEAT_J002_TOOL_NAMES (calculate, capabilities_refresh, capabilities_subscribe_updates, dispatch_by_capability, get_calendar_events, list_available_capabilities, queue_build, read_file, search_web) are all wired.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The supervisor's tool catalogue includes the five AsyncSubAgentMiddleware operational tools: start_async_task, check_async_task, update_async_task, cancel_async_task, list_async_tasks (scenario: Wiring the async subagent injects the five middleware operational tools).
completion_promises.evidence: TestAC003AsyncMiddlewareToolsInjected::test_compiled_graph_exposes_all_five_async_middleware_tools walks the compiled supervisor (built with async_subagents=build_async_subagents(config)) and asserts every member of ASYNC_MIDDLEWARE_TOOL_NAMES (the five middleware operational tool names) is present.

TestAC004AttendedListContainsFrontier has two tests: test_attended_list_contains_escalate_to_frontier asserts assemble_tool_list(config, registry, include_frontier=True) contains 'escalate_to_frontier' alongside the FEAT-J002 baseline; test_attended_supervisor_exposes_escalate_to_frontier walks the compiled graph and asserts 'escalate_to_frontier' is wired.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Ambient tool list (include_frontier=False) excludes escalate_to_frontier AND contains all FEAT-J002 tools (scenario: escalate_to_frontier is not present in the ambient tool list at all + the assembled list still contains all FEAT-JARVIS-002 tools).
completion_promises.evidence: TestAC005AmbientListExcludesFrontier has four tests: test_ambient_list_excludes_escalate_to_frontier asserts 'escalate_to_frontier' NOT in names; test_ambient_list_contains_all_feat_j002_tools asserts the full FEAT-J002 9-tool baseline is preserved; test_ambient_list_has_exactly_nine_tools asserts len==9; test_ambient_factory_attached_to_compiled_graph asserts the supplied closure is attached verbatim to graph._jarvis_ambient_tool_factory and yields the expected ambient surface.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Backward-compat: build_supervisor(test_config, tools=<FEAT-J002 set>) (no async_subagents) returns a valid CompiledStateGraph WITHOUT the five middleware tools (scenario: Building the supervisor without async subagents preserves existing behaviour).
completion_promises.evidence: TestAC006BackwardCompatNoAsyncSubagents has three tests: test_build_without_async_subagents_returns_compiled_graph asserts isinstance(graph, CompiledStateGraph); test_build_without_async_subagents_omits_middleware_tools asserts wired & ASYNC_MIDDLEWARE_TOOL_NAMES is empty; test_build_without_async_subagents_retains_feat_j002_tools asserts the FEAT-J002 baseline survives.

TestAC007NoLLMNetworkCall::test_fake_llm_response_cursor_remains_at_zero patches jarvis.agents.supervisor.init_chat_model to return a FakeListChatModel from the conftest fake_llm fixture, asserts mock_init_chat_model.assert_called_once_with(supervisor_model) (proving no real provider client was constructed), and asserts fake_llm.i == 0 after build_supervisor (proving no .invoke/.ainvoke happened during build).

completion_promises.criterion_text: uv run pytest tests/test_supervisor_with_subagents.py -v passes with >= 80% coverage on the new test module.
